title: Managerial Accounting: Identify one key role of managerial accounting within an organization....
summary: Identify a primary purpose of managerial accounting in aiding management decision-making.
prompt: Identify one key role of managerial accounting within an organization.

options.text: One key role of managerial accounting is to assist management in

solution: One key role of managerial accounting is to assist management in decision-making by providing relevant and timely information to internal users (Page 51).
